elements.name: intro_text
elements.html:
Welcome to Code.org's AI Foundations

{unit_name}

Post-Unit Teacher Survey

Code.org relies on surveys as a crucial tool to remain connected to teachers, and to give you the opportunity to provide feedback about your experience teaching our curriculum.

The purpose of this survey is to understand better our teachers' experience with Code.org's AI Foundations, {unit_name}. 

Privacy and Confidentiality

  • Your individual responses here are completely confidential.
  • Your identity will never be revealed publicly or used to tie any responses back to you personally.
  • We may share de-identified, aggregate data (representing all responses) publicly.
  • Your de-identified responses will be used by Code.org to improve our curriculum and programs.

This survey should take less than 5 minutes to complete.  Your complete honesty and candor are appreciated.

elements.name: curriculum_perceptions
elements.html:
Your Perceptions About Code.org's AIF, {unit_name}

Please share with us your thoughts about the design and content of {unit_name} of the AI Foundations curriculum.

elements.name: student_engagement
elements.title: Were most students engaged and interested in the topics covered in {unit_name}?

elements.name: confident_to_teach
elements.title: How confident did you feel in your ablity to effectively teach the concepts in {unit_name}?

elements.name: supported_to_teach
elements.title: Were the teaching resources provided effective in supporting you to teach the concepts in {unit_name}?
elements.description: Teaching resources include lesson plans, slides, self-paced professional learning modules, etc.

elements.name: nps_value
elements.title: How likely are you to recommend this unit to other teachers?

elements.name: challenges_teaching
elements.title: What challenges did you encounter while teaching this unit?

choices.text: Lack of student engagement or motivation
Time constraints in covering all the material
Integrating the unit with other curriculum requirements
Managing diverse learning speeds and styles

elements.name: other_feedback_FR
elements.title: Is there anything else you would like to share about your teaching experience with the Code.org team? Your constructive feedback is essential for us to improve our curriculum, and we appreciate you sharing it with us.

elements.name: aif_participate_focus_group
elements.title: OPTIONAL: Would you be willing to participate in a follow-up focus group to provide direct feedback about your experience teaching AIF, {unit_name}? We are really interested in hearing from teachers to help us improve this unit.

elements.name: aif_email_focus_group
elements.title: Great! Please share an email address where we may contact you.

elements.name: thank_you
elements.html:
Thank You!

Thanks from Code.org for your time, thoughts, and passion for teaching.
